case_title: STIEL, EDWARD vs. VRATARI, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS LEE AN INDIVIDUAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STIEL, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT VRATARI, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS LEE, AN INDIVIDUAL & DBA VRATARI LEGAL SERVICE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STIEL, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VRATARI, NICHOLAS AKA NICHOLAS LEE, AN INDIVIDUAL & DBA VRATARI LEGAL SERVICE $5,050.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,133.00
